name: CVx
description: 1U MIDI-to-CV converter providing pitch, gate, velocity, mod wheel, aftertouch, clock, and reset outputs. Receives MIDI from Intellijel MIDI 1U via internal ribbon cable.

controls.name: Channel Select
controls.description: MIDI channel configured via Intellijel 1U config app (no physical control).
controls.detail: Channels 1–16 · omni mode available · requires Midi 1U connected via ribbon

outputs.name: Pitch
outputs.description: 1V/oct pitch CV derived from MIDI note number.

outputs.name: Gate
outputs.description: Gate output, high when a MIDI note is held.

outputs.name: Velocity
outputs.description: CV proportional to MIDI note-on velocity.

outputs.name: Mod Wheel
outputs.description: CV tracking MIDI CC1 (mod wheel) value.

outputs.name: Aftertouch
outputs.description: CV tracking MIDI channel aftertouch pressure.

outputs.name: Clock
outputs.description: Clock pulse output derived from MIDI clock. Rate depends on configuration (typically 1/8th or 1/16th note).

outputs.name: Reset
outputs.description: Pulse output on MIDI Start or Continue messages for syncing sequencers.

behaviors.name: MIDI Note to CV/Gate
behaviors.description: Converts incoming MIDI notes to 1V/oct pitch and gate. Follows standard last-note priority. Gate stays high for held notes.

behaviors.name: MIDI Clock Sync
behaviors.description: Outputs clock pulses derived from MIDI timing clock. Useful for synchronizing analog sequencers and clock dividers to MIDI.

behaviors.name: Expression Outputs
behaviors.description: Velocity, mod wheel, and aftertouch each output independent CVs for expressive control of VCA, VCF, or other CV destinations.

patchIdeas.name: Keyboard-controlled voice
patchIdeas.patch: Pitch → VCO V/Oct · Gate → envelope trigger · Velocity → VCA CV for dynamic response

patchIdeas.name: Mod wheel filter sweep
patchIdeas.patch: Mod Wheel → VCF cutoff CV · play keyboard and use mod wheel for real-time filter control

patchIdeas.name: MIDI-synced sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Clock → sequencer clock in · Reset → sequencer reset · sequencer runs in time with DAW
